questions.title: Percentages Practice 1

questions.title: Profit and Loss Practice 2
questions.questionText: An article costs Rs. 110 and is sold at a profit of 9%. Find the selling price.
questions.explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 110 x 109/100 = Rs. 120.

questions.title: Simple Interest Practice 3
questions.questionText: A can finish a task in 12 days and B can finish it in 18 days. What is their combined one-day work?
questions.explanation: A's work per day is 1/12 and B's is 1/18. Together = 1/12 + 1/18 = 30/216.

questions.explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 6. Therefore the next term is 29 + 6 = 35.

codingProblems.title: Two Sum Indices 1
codingProblems.problemStatement: Given an input focused on arrays, design an efficient algorithm for "Two Sum Indices 1". Return the requested result while handling edge cases such as empty input, duplicates, and boundary sizes.
constraints: Use O(n log n) time or better where possible
codingProblems.solutionExplanation: Identify the invariant for arrays, choose the appropriate data structure, process each element once where possible, and maintain only the state needed for the final answer. Discuss time complexity and space complexity clearly in an interview.

questions.questionText: A value 40 is increased by 5%. What is the new value?
Find the next number in the series: 5, 11, 17, 23, 29, ?
questions.explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 6. Therefore the next term is 29 + 6 = 35.

questions.questionText: An article costs Rs. 160 and is sold at a profit of 14%. Find the selling price.
questions.explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 160 x 114/100 = Rs. 182.

questions.questionText: Choose the closest meaning of the word "CONCISE".
questions.explanation: "concise" most closely means "brief and clear" in placement verbal ability contexts.

questions.questionText: A can finish a task in 8 days and B can finish it in 18 days. What is their combined one-day work?
questions.explanation: A's work per day is 1/8 and B's is 1/18. Together = 1/8 + 1/18 = 26/144.

questions.questionText: A value 55 is increased by 40%. What is the new value?
Find the next number in the series: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, ?
questions.explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 5. Therefore the next term is 25 + 5 = 30.

questions.questionText: An article costs Rs. 110 and is sold at a profit of 9%. Find the selling price.
questions.explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 110 x 109/100 = Rs. 120.

questions.questionText: Choose the closest meaning of the word "PRUDENT".
questions.explanation: "prudent" most closely means "wise and careful" in placement verbal ability contexts.

questions.questionText: A can finish a task in 14 days and B can finish it in 18 days. What is their combined one-day work?
questions.explanation: A's work per day is 1/14 and B's is 1/18. Together = 1/14 + 1/18 = 32/252.

questions.questionText: A value 45 is increased by 20%. What is the new value?

questions.explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 5. Therefore the next term is 25 + 5 = 30.

questions.questionText: An article costs Rs. 110 and is sold at a profit of 9%. Find the selling price.
questions.explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 110 x 109/100 = Rs. 120.
